meaning: n.欧洲共同市场的官员或职员
examples: One well-placed Eurocrat sums up the sense of despair.
SERBIA, comments one eurocrat dryly, is being defrosted bit by bit.
The EU, explains one Eurocrat, "is not a club but a family-a Maltese one, with no divorce."
It did not happen in good times, so now it must in bad times, declares one Eurocrat.
The frenzy about growth has gone too far, says one Eurocrat.
